title: Review Phase 1 implementation against coordinator spec

comments.author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
comments.content: Phase 1 is NOT complete. Only ferrum-core sub-agents (1a-1d) were executed. Agents 2-5 (ufunc, stats, io, workspace+reexport) are empty stubs.

comments.author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
comments.content: Transitioning from review to execution. Will now act as Phase 0 coordinator to complete Phase 1. Remaining agents: 2 (ufunc), 3 (stats), 4 (io), 5 (workspace+reexport). Core (1a-1d) already merged.
